$comment: Shadow tokens. Elevation has a reason — pick the shadow that matches the layering relationship, not 'how pretty'. Code source of truth: packages/ui/src/tokens/tokens.json (primitive.shadow).

sm.usage: Card hairline elevation — distinguishes a raised surface from the page without claiming altitude.
sm.notes: Tailwind: shadow-sm. Default for the Card primitive.

md.usage: Default raised elevation — used on cards that sit above other content, sticky headers.
md.notes: Tailwind: shadow (the default Tailwind name). Avoid overusing — competing elevations flatten.

lg.usage: Dialogs, popovers, dropdowns — surfaces that sit above the scrim layer.
lg.notes: Tailwind: shadow-lg. Pair with bg-surface-raised and rounded-card.

focus.usage: Soft focus glow that complements the ring utility on dense surfaces.
focus.notes: Tailwind: shadow-focus. The Button primitive uses the ring utility; this token is for surfaces where the ring would clip.
